archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)

typography.pairing_strategy: Classic Serif Headings + Clean Sans Body

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-first, High visual impact with negative space.
layout_and_spacing.product_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-8

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-black/5 z-50 sticky top-0
surface_strategies.footer: Solid Deep Tone: bg-[#1A1918] text-white py-20
surface_strategies.product_cards: Flat background bg-white border border-black/5 hover:border-[#C99A82]/30 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1918] text-white hover:bg-[#333230] rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-[0.1em] uppercase transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1A1918] text-[#1A1918] hover:bg-[#1A1918] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-[0.1em] uppercase transition-colors

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Phosphor Icons with 'Thin' or 'Light' weight to match the delicate jewelry aesthetic.

hero_banner.description: Young woman with pearl necklace and ring - use for main landing hero section.

category_rings.description: Close up of a diamond ring on a blue cloth - use for Rings category.

category_necklaces.description: Close-up of a woman's neck showcasing elegant gold necklaces - use for Necklaces category.

category_earrings.description: Gold dangle earrings on black velvet display - use for Earrings category.

category_bracelets_bangles.description: Close-up of gold jewelry elegantly arranged - use for Bracelets/Bangles category.

ai_assistant_bg.description: Abstract background with pink and yellow gradients - use as a subtle background for the AI Chat Assistant.

component_instructions.shadcn_ui: Use Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, inputs, tabs. Strongly customize them to remove the default 'Vercel-look'. Overwrite borders to be thinner (border-black/10) and use square or very small border-radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
component_instructions.animations: Use Framer Motion for page transitions, slow smooth scrolling (lenis), and staggered list item entrances. Avoid bouncy or fast animations. Everything should feel 'delicate' and 'expensive'.

testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing on a highly premium, minimalist look.
Always use the media URLs provided here. Never use placeholders.
Implement the 'Cormorant Garamond' font for all headings, 'Manrope' for body text.
Ensure the hero image has a subtle overlay if text sits on top (e.g. bg-white/20 with text shadow or a gradient) so it remains completely legible.
For the AI chat assistant, create a floating interactive widget or a dedicated page with the 'ai_assistant_bg' as a subtle backdrop, styled with glassmorphism.
Product images should have a subtle zoom on hover (scale-105 with long transition duration).
Add `@phosphor-icons/react` using yarn and use it across the site for thin, elegant icons.
All JS/JSX should be written carefully, avoid TSX as requested.
